parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, signalId: $('Validate Payload').item.json.signalId, status: $('Validate Payload').item.json.status } }}

_readme.description: POST /webhook/jobfilter-outcome { signalId, status, note? } → forwards to /api/start-signals/:id/feedback → writes JobFilter/Outcomes/<id>.md → logs via 04.
